prompt: Remove obsolete ICMP responder compatibility wrapper
note: Removes the stale ICMP responder tail after the DPlane packet input refactor.
decisions: Delete the old ICMP_ResponderService name because packet input ownership has moved to DPlane and the project does not need compatibility for this new internal API.

Add RM route table with Radix LPM index

+

Added RM route table indexes by prefix/interface/source and active-route LPM lookup.

+

Files

+
  • src/RM/rib.py
  • src/RM/routes.py
  • src/RM/__init__.py
  • src/IP/ICMP/ping.py
  • tests/test_routing.py
+

Decisions

+
  • Keep route selection inside RM and expose a RIB plus active IPv4 Radix tree for longest-prefix-match.
  • Leave ICMP as a FIB caller only; remove direct-route wording from ping failure text.
+

Architecture

+

IP, RM, tests

Wire RM connected routes from IP interface events to FIB

+

IP address events now create connected active routes that FIB can use for forwarding lookup.

+

Files

+
  • src/RM/rib.py
  • src/RM/routes.py
  • src/RM/__init__.py
  • tests/test_routing.py
+

Decisions

+
  • RM route table is stored in CLI state and updated synchronously from RM_IM interface/address events.
  • FIB lookup uses the RM state route table when present; otherwise it keeps the older compatibility path.
+

Architecture

+

RM, tests

Add show ip routing-table command family

+

Supports active route display and protocol filtering for direct/connected/static/dynamic routes.

+

Files

+
  • src/RM/commands.py
  • tests/test_routing.py

Decisions

+

  • Add show ip as a visible command group; keep show rm incomplete as previously required.
+
